description: Precision vineyard management optimizing grape yield. Build multi-spectral analysis pipelines tracking vine water stress, precise topography mapping, and targeted spraying.
learning_objectives: Understand viticulture and specialty crop growth cycles, canopy management practices, and quality‑determining factors
Build AI models for grape bunch counting, berry disease detection, vine stress assessment, and yield forecasting
Create geospatial data pipelines for per‑vine historical data management and agronomic reporting
Deploy real‑time spectral analysis and detection models on drones navigating dense vineyard rows
Implement targeted micro‑dosing dispensing for minimal chemical use in high‑value crops
Integrate with wine/crop management software and precision agriculture platforms
Comply with EU/US pesticide application regulations and organic certification requirements

modules.title: Micro-Topographic Stress Modeling
modules.description: Generate high-resolution thermal and vegetative indices to precisely model water stress in individual vine rows.
topics: Calculating CWSI (Crop Water Stress Index) via Thermal/NDVI fusion
Variable Rate Application (VRA) mapping for pesticide drones
Predicting harvest timing via multi-temporal analysis
Generating precise elevation gradients to model water runoff

capstone_project.name: Precision Viticulture Drone System
capstone_project.description: Deploy a drone system across a 10‑hectare vineyard. Complete a seasonal workflow: baseline NDVI mapping, weekly disease scouting with automated alerts, grape bunch counting for yield forecasting, and targeted micro‑dosing spray mission on detected disease zones. Achieve bunch count accuracy <5% MAPE, disease detection sensitivity >85%, and reduce spray volume by >50% vs. full‑coverage application.
deliverables: Vine‑level PostGIS database with seasonal observations
Micro‑dosing spray controller with application log

resources.name: WineGIS Europe Project
resources.description: EU project on precision viticulture with remote sensing

glossary.definition: Crop Water Stress Index. A measure of plant stress derived from canopy temperature.
Variable Rate Application. Applying materials at a specific rate for a specific location.
